chunks.text: Resources for Faculty and Staff - EECS at Berkeley Resources for Faculty and Staff Quick links My EECS Info Update research and faculty web pages and access internal functions like grad review Building Access Required procedures to obtain access to EECS facilities Working From Home VPN (GlobalProtect), mapping network drives, remote desktop (WINTERM), resource access URLs (EECS databases, zoom, docusign) Event Planning Calendar A list of major events that impact large segments of the EECS population (faculty/staff/students) to help you plan your event. EECS Event Calendar All departmental events on the campus calendar system. Submit an event to the EECS Calendar Post an event to the EECS Calendar: it will appear on the EECS home page and the Cory and Soda Hall wall displays. Student Award Nominations Please consider nominating deserving students for this year's student awards.
